title: Cobble Inc.
description: Progress through the industrialization with the company of your cobblemon!
body:
Wanna ever play minecraft with Pixelmon / Cobblemon?
How about minecraft with machines?

Why not both?

This project aims to mix the world of Cobblemon and automation, while giving the general flair of a vast modded world with several new features such as the Aether.

Though some features may seem redundant, it is for your choice which path of automation, storage, and progression path you may choose!

This modpack features:
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
- [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) (AE2)
- [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage)
- [Functional Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/functional-storage)
- [Tech Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Industrial Foregoing](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-foregoing)
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- Xaero's [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
And more!

Thanks to Sinytra and their team for making the [Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) Mod that makes this modpack possible!
